I have the skill to use my magic to create potions.  I am a bit proud about it.  Not everyone can do that, you know.
這裡沒什麼，但你很接近了。: 「我有用魔法配製藥水的技能。我對此感到驕傲。並不是每個人都能做到，你知道。」

I'm sorry, I just don't know much about that.  Perhaps you should ask someone else.

Thank you, but I have all the flowers I need.

Thank you.  I often use flowers from Erana's Peace in potion making.  Here are your silvers.\nYou put them away.
這裡沒什麼，但你很接近了。: 「謝謝。我經常在配製藥水時用伊瑞娜的安寧之地的花。給你銀幣。」\n你把它們放起來。

Thank you, but I have enough mushrooms.

These are very nice.  I'll dry them and grind them into a powder.  Let me think...oh yes! I said these are worth a gold.  Here you are.\nYou put it away.
